name: Lindsborg South Park
description: Lindsborg South Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lindsborg, KS. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Mcpherson Family YMCA
description: Mcpherson Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McPherson, KS. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Moundridge Courts
description: Moundridge Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Moundridge, KS. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
